options.name: -include_edges
options.description: Considers leading or trailing edge of the clock while defining categories.

options.name: -include_mode
options.description: Considers constraint mode while defining categories.

options.name: -include_views
options.description: Considers analysis views while defining categories.

options.name: -master
options.description: Specifies that the analysis should be performed only for the specified master category.
